# SpatialAudioPlayer3D.AbsorptionDampingInfluence property

How strongly surface absorption influences reverb damping.

`0.0` = absorption has no effect on damping.

`1.0` = full physical effect.

```csharp
public float AbsorptionDampingInfluence { get; set; }
```
